name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire OPQ32r
description: Measures 32 workplace behaviour dimensions including strategic thinking, influencing style, leadership, and interpersonal style. Gold-standard personality instrument used across all levels from graduate to CXO. Used for selection, development, and leadership benchmarking.

name: OPQ Universal Competency Report 2.0
description: Report format for OPQ32r providing a comprehensive competency-based view of personality results mapped to the Universal Competency Framework. Suitable for all roles and levels.

name: OPQ Leadership Report
description: OPQ32r report format focused on leadership behaviours. Ideal for senior selection and leadership benchmarking at director and C-suite level.

name: OPQ MQ Sales Report
description: OPQ32r report format framed for sales roles. Optionally combines OPQ with Motivation Questionnaire (MQ) to add motivators and drives to the sales personality profile. Used for sales selection and development.

name: SHL Verify Interactive G+
description: Adaptive general cognitive ability test covering inductive, numerical, and deductive reasoning in a single 36-minute test. Used for graduate, professional, and senior individual contributor selection. Strongest predictor of job performance across roles.

name: SHL Verify Interactive – Numerical Reasoning
description: Numerical reasoning assessment measuring ability to interpret and draw conclusions from numerical data, charts, and tables. Used for financial, analytical, and data-heavy roles.

name: SHL Verify Interactive – Inductive Reasoning
description: Inductive reasoning test measuring ability to identify patterns and relationships. Predicts problem-solving capability and general intelligence.

name: SHL Verify Interactive – Deductive Reasoning
description: Deductive reasoning test measuring ability to follow logical arguments and draw conclusions. Used alongside inductive and numerical for comprehensive cognitive battery.

name: SHL Verify Interactive – Verbal Reasoning
description: Verbal reasoning test measuring ability to read and interpret written information, draw logical conclusions from written passages.

name: Graduate Scenarios
description: Situational judgement test (SJT) designed specifically for graduate-level candidates. Presents realistic workplace scenarios and assesses judgment and decision-making appropriate for early-career professionals. Untimed.

name: Dependability and Safety Instrument (DSI)
description: Personality instrument measuring integrity, reliability, safety attitudes, and dependability. Used for safety-critical roles, healthcare, finance, and any position requiring trust and rule compliance. Predicts whether candidates will follow procedures.

name: Manufac. & Indust. - Safety & Dependability 8.0
description: Manufacturing and industrial sector-specific bundled personality solution measuring safety behaviour and dependability. Calibrated with industrial and manufacturing workforce norms. Recommended for plant operators, warehouse, factory, and industrial roles.

name: Workplace Health and Safety (New)
description: Knowledge test measuring understanding of workplace health and safety principles, regulations, and procedures. Suitable for roles where safety compliance knowledge is required.

name: SVAR Spoken English (US) (New)
description: Spoken English proficiency assessment calibrated for US English accent. Used for contact centre and customer-facing roles where spoken English communication quality is critical.

name: SVAR Spoken English (UK) (New)
description: Spoken English proficiency assessment calibrated for UK English accent. Used for UK-based contact centre and customer-facing roles.

name: SVAR Spoken English (Australia) (New)
description: Spoken English proficiency assessment calibrated for Australian English accent.

name: SVAR Spoken English (India) (New)
description: Spoken English proficiency assessment calibrated for Indian English accent.

name: Contact Center Call Simulation (New)
description: Standalone simulation of inbound call centre interactions. Candidates handle simulated customer calls and are evaluated on communication, problem-solving, and call handling. Used for volume screening of contact centre agents.

name: Customer Service Phone Simulation
description: Bundled older solution combining biodata, personality, and simulation for phone-based customer service roles. Used for finalist-stage depth assessment or as a comprehensive single tool.

name: Entry Level Customer Serv - Retail & Contact Center
description: Personality and competency assessment for entry-level customer service roles across retail and contact centre environments. Measures service orientation, reliability, and interpersonal traits.

name: Global Skills Assessment
description: Self-reported skills and competency assessment covering 16 universal skills. Used for talent audits, skills gap analysis, re-skilling initiatives, and development planning. Suitable for all roles and levels.

name: Global Skills Development Report
description: Development report companion to the Global Skills Assessment. Provides actionable development plans and recommendations based on GSA results. Used for reskilling and upskilling programs.

name: Sales Transformation 2.0 - Individual Contributor
description: OPQ-based report measuring how individual sales contributors show up in digital-first selling environments. Covers modern sales behaviours for individual rep evaluation and development.

name: Core Java (Advanced Level) (New)
description: Advanced-level Java knowledge test covering concurrency, JVM internals, performance tuning, design patterns, and production-grade Java. For senior and experienced Java engineers.

name: Core Java (Entry Level) (New)
description: Entry-level Java knowledge test covering fundamental Java concepts, OOP principles, basic data structures. For junior or graduate Java developers.

name: Spring (New)
description: Knowledge test for the Spring Framework covering Spring Boot, Spring MVC, dependency injection, and REST API development with Spring.

name: RESTful Web Services (New)
description: Knowledge test covering REST API design principles, HTTP methods, status codes, authentication patterns, and web service implementation.

name: SQL (New)
description: SQL knowledge test covering SELECT statements, joins, subqueries, aggregations, database design concepts, and SQL best practices.

name: Amazon Web Services (AWS) Development (New)
description: Knowledge test for AWS cloud development covering core services (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS), cloud architecture principles, and deployment.

name: Docker (New)
description: Knowledge test covering Docker containerisation concepts, Dockerfile, Docker Compose, container orchestration basics, and DevOps practices.

name: Angular (New)
description: Knowledge test for Angular framework covering components, services, routing, forms, and Angular best practices.

name: Python (New)
description: Python programming knowledge test covering Python syntax, data structures, functions, OOP, and common Python patterns.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: JavaScript knowledge test covering core JS concepts, ES6+, async patterns, DOM manipulation, and modern JavaScript development.

name: React (New)
description: Knowledge test for React covering components, hooks, state management, props, and React best practices.

name: Linux Programming (General)
description: Linux knowledge test covering shell scripting, file systems, process management, system administration, and command-line tools. Used for systems engineers and DevOps roles.

name: Networking and Implementation (New)
description: Knowledge test covering networking concepts including TCP/IP, protocols, network architecture, and implementation practices.

name: Smart Interview Live Coding
description: Adaptive live-coding interview platform where interviewers can set coding challenges in any programming language. Supports pair programming and real-time coding evaluation. Used for senior technical candidates where no language-specific test exists.

name: Financial Accounting (New)
description: Knowledge test covering financial accounting principles, journal entries, balance sheets, income statements, and financial reporting.

name: Basic Statistics (New)
description: Knowledge test covering statistical concepts including mean, median, standard deviation, probability, and basic statistical analysis.

name: HIPAA (Security)
description: Knowledge test measuring understanding of HIPAA security provisions, patient data privacy requirements, and healthcare data handling compliance.

name: Medical Terminology (New)
description: Knowledge test measuring understanding of medical terminology, abbreviations, and clinical vocabulary used in healthcare administration roles.

name: Microsoft Word 365 - Essentials (New)
description: Simulation-based assessment of essential Microsoft Word skills including formatting, tables, styles, and document management. For roles requiring basic to intermediate Word proficiency.

name: MS Excel (New)
description: Short knowledge test for Microsoft Excel covering formulas, functions, data manipulation, and spreadsheet basics. Fast and suitable for initial screening.

name: MS Word (New)
description: Short knowledge test for Microsoft Word covering formatting, editing, and document management basics. Fast initial screening tool.

name: Microsoft Excel 365 (New)
description: Comprehensive Excel simulation testing real-world spreadsheet tasks in Excel 365. Covers formulas, pivot tables, data analysis, and Excel best practices.

name: Microsoft Word 365 (New)
description: Comprehensive Word simulation testing document creation, formatting, styles, and advanced Word 365 features through hands-on tasks.

name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Measures 18 factors of workplace motivation including rewards, recognition, influence, and autonomy. Used to understand what drives candidates and employees for better retention and engagement decisions.

name: Agile Software Development (New)
description: Knowledge test measuring understanding of Agile methodology, Scrum, Kanban, sprint planning, and agile software development practices.

name: Manual Testing (New)
description: Knowledge test for manual software testing covering test life cycle, test case design, testing tools, and bug reporting.

name: Selenium (New)
description: Knowledge test for Selenium test automation covering WebDriver, test scripts, automation frameworks, and Selenium best practices.

name: Kubernetes (New)
description: Knowledge test for Kubernetes container orchestration covering pods, deployments, services, scaling, and cluster management.

name: Microsoft Azure (New)
description: Knowledge test for Microsoft Azure cloud platform covering core services, deployment, storage, and Azure architecture.

name: Google Cloud Platform (GCP) (New)
description: Knowledge test for Google Cloud Platform covering GCP services, architecture, and cloud deployment.

name: SHL Verify – Calculation
description: Numerical calculation test assessing speed and accuracy in mental arithmetic without a calculator. Used for roles requiring fast mental math such as cashiers, retail, and data entry.

name: Microsoft PowerPoint 365 (New)
description: Simulation test for PowerPoint 365 covering slide creation, formatting, animations, and presentation skills.

name: Typing Proficiency - English (US)
description: Typing speed and accuracy test in English (US). Used for roles requiring efficient data entry, transcription, or document production.

name: Data Entry 7.0
description: Data entry speed and accuracy assessment measuring ability to enter data quickly and correctly. Used for administrative and clerical roles.

name: OPQ Manager Report
description: OPQ32r report format specifically designed for manager-level roles. Provides insights into management style, team leadership, and people management behaviours.

name: Sales Manager Sales Transformation Report
description: OPQ-based report for sales managers measuring how they lead teams in a digital-first selling environment. Companion to Sales Transformation 2.0 for individual contributors.

name: C# (New)
description: Knowledge test for C# programming covering .NET, object-oriented programming, LINQ, async patterns, and C# best practices.

name: C++ (New)
description: Knowledge test for C++ programming covering memory management, templates, STL, OOP, and systems programming concepts.

name: TypeScript (New)
description: Knowledge test for TypeScript covering typing system, interfaces, generics, and TypeScript best practices.

name: Node.js (New)
description: Knowledge test for Node.js covering event loop, async programming, npm ecosystem, Express, and server-side JavaScript.

name: MongoDB (New)
description: Knowledge test for MongoDB covering document model, queries, aggregation, indexing, and NoSQL concepts.

name: Git (New)
description: Knowledge test for Git version control covering branching, merging, rebasing, and collaborative workflows.

name: Salesforce (New)
description: Knowledge test for Salesforce CRM covering Salesforce objects, workflows, reports, and administration.
